applies_when: User asks whether the store has the wine without sharing scene, budget, or timing facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague liquor-store inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to solve it quickly
Ask for scene direction, budget band, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a specific bottle without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更像送礼、婚宴还是自饮，再加上预算和想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides scene and timing facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the scene
User is unsure what budget or bottle suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe visit path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the liquor-store route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把这次场景、预算和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a holiday, banquet, or gifting deadline soon
User needs a visit before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and alcohol scope that decide whether the store can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and scene fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the visit is scoped
items.safe_transition: 如果你把送礼、婚宴或聚餐的节点和最想解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类到店。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User worries about authenticity, authorization, or price-gap issues
User asks why scan price and store price differ
items.response_goal: Stabilize trust concerns and move the user toward fact-based evidence instead of argument.
do: Acknowledge the concern without sounding defensive
Ask what bottle or batch they are comparing
avoid: Turning the reply into a price battle
items.safe_transition: 如果你把在看的是哪一款、预算和最担心的点发我，我可以先按门店能提供的证据帮你收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: Evidence-sensitive cases should route toward Catcher with trust flags.

applies_when: User needs wine tonight or asks about immediate delivery
items.response_goal: Calm time pressure first and guide toward the safest fulfillment path.
do: Ask which store, roughly when, and whether pickup or limited delivery would work
Keep the promise bounded by actual hours
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我门店、时间和更像自提还是送达，我可以先帮你判断哪条路更稳。
items.handoff_suggestion: Time-sensitive cases should move quickly toward Dispatcher after qualification.

applies_when: User says they bought before or wants to restock
User refers to a previous bottle or order
items.response_goal: Make the restock conversation feel familiar and efficient, not like a cold start.
do: Ask the smallest number of facts needed for this round
Guide toward quantity and timing confirmation
avoid: Repeating the full first-time education flow
items.safe_transition: 如果是上次那类酒，这次你更像补一箱、补几瓶，还是顺便看看别的路线？
items.handoff_suggestion: If history and quantity become clear, route to Catcher or Followup.
